---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle
alias: hearthline_sensor_bundle
purchased_on: 2026-01-02
total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---
# Door and hallway sensor bundle

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle |
| alias          | hearthline_sensor_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-02                    |
| total_eur      | 50                            |
| counterparty   | Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH     |
| project        | Hearthline                    |
| related_entity | Juniper                       |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | Zigbee door sensors  | 2   | 18       | 36       |
| 2 | AAA rechargeable set | 1   | 14       | 14       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                |     |          | 50       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Needed to test whether household events could be summarized without making the house feel creepy.

next_step.current_state: First OCR migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox check is not applicable because this was a finance record update, not an outbox message. Continue remaining Juniper-related bill migrations.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete inbox request file and report completion
next_step.observation: Wrote schema-shaped YAML frontmatter plus preserved original body to 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_02__eur_000050__bill__hearthline_sensor_bundle.md.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by OCR-structuring all Juniper-related bills in purchases. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (bill fields + lines) to three matching records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflow/schema docs before task work, used canonical entity record for identifier-based finance lookup, preserved original file bodies exactly beneath frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox item requested OCR of bills related to Juniper. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/juniper.md established identifier `juniper`; finance searches and reads identified three purchase bills with related_entity Juniper. Each was migrated to the required bill schema from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md with original body preserved, satisfying OCR/migration workflows. Request completed without ambiguity or security trigger.
